channel.title: Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic
channel.description: Upcoming events for Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic

item.title: Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 3803 Delridge Way SW, Seattle

Weekly open mic with full backline provided and 16-track recording available. Free sign-up.

Event details
